# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(Python3 REQUIRED)

add_library(essentials-core-langver)


target_include_directories(essentials-core-langver PUBLIC
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver
)

target_link_libraries(essentials-core-langver PUBLIC
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  essentials-core-issue
  essentials-public-langver
)

target_sources(essentials-core-langver PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.gen.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/yql_core_langver.cpp
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.gen.h
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.h
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/yql_core_langver.h
)


add_custom_command(
  OUTPUT
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.gen.h
  DEPENDS
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/data/language/features.json
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.gen.py
  COMMAND
  Python3::Interpreter
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.gen.py
  --input
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yql/essentials/data/language/features.json
  --output
  ${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/yql/essentials/core/langver/feature.gen.h
)
